nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Trigger with: POST https://YOUR-N8N-INSTANCE.onrender.com/webhook/wf04-timeline — or add a Schedule node for automatic runs.

nodes.name: Fetch All Entries
nodes.notes: Fetches all rows from the metadata table. For large tables (>10K rows), add pagination.

nodes.name: Split in Batches
nodes.notes: Processes one entry at a time. Increase batchSize if your Supabase plan supports higher concurrency.

parameters.responseBody: ={"status": "complete", "message": "Timeline clustering complete", "analysis": {{$node['Narrative Arc Detection'].json.analysis}}, "entries_updated": {{$node['Narrative Arc Detection'].json.total_entries}}}
